title: 折り入っての頼みごと

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan, you might want to get ready for bed
earlier today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Otherwise, an ordinary cold could
become the least of my worries—achooey!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A-are you okay?! Oh no! Um, um!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Is there something I can do for you? We're
roommates, so no request will ever be too much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm perfectly all right... Although I appreciate
the sentiment.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, i-if you're sure...

Excuse me for intruding during your moment of
respite.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is your condition improving, Ardan? I come
bearing many gifts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Wow, are these all for me? Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I brought you some cold medicine, a cooling
patch for your fever, face masks, and canned
peaches... It's nothing extravagant, but I hope it
aids in your recovery.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Should you require anything else, just say the
word!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well... If I might make use of your goodwill, I do
have a request.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, I see it now. She'd rather ask Yaeno
instead...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Could you let Chiyono O stay in your room until I
make a complete recovery?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's quite easy to pass on a summer cold.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is no bother for me in the slightest! I'll go
talk it over with my roommate.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Yaeno, you're so capable. And then there's me,
unable to do a single thing.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Whatever do you mean? I'm sure your presence
brings her more than enough comfort.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is precisely why Ardan is concerned over
your safety.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you really think so?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This room is awfully quiet when no one's around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I should get a little outside air...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... My throat feels so much better now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh my, I'm getting a call.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan, can you hear me? There's something I
forgot to tell you earlier.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, feel free to call whenever you like! We could
always just talk even if there's nothing bothering
you! I know you get lonely by yourself at night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you very much. I hope you'll be my
conversation partner in my moments of ennui.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... so, so much. I'll do my best to get
well for you too.
